name: ExtensionDevice_Endpoint
title: R5: Technical endpoints providing access to electronic services provided by the device (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Device.endpoint` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Device.endpoint` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Endpoint)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Device.endpoint` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Endpoint)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Device.endpoint` has a context of Device based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Device`.
Element `Device.endpoint` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Technical endpoints providing access to electronic services provided by the device (new)
element.comment:

element.short: Technical endpoints providing access to electronic services provided by the device
element.definition: Technical endpoints providing access to services provided by the device defined at this resource.
